query: Skippr AI: The live AI employee inside your product, serving every user complaints OR frustrating OR broken

results.title:
We just launched Skippr on Product Hunt 🚀

It's a live AI employee inside your product: it sees the user's screen, talks with them, and operates the software in real time.

Onboarding, activation… | Sagi Shorrer | 26 comments
results.content:
At KKeyQik, that's exactly what we do for SaaS founders. Feel free to DM if you'd ever want to explore that — either way, rooting for the Skippr team! [...] ##### Transcript

Naman Agarwal, graphic [...] Congrats on shipping Skippr, Sagi! A live AI employee that sees the screen, talks to the user, and drives the software in real time — that's a genuinely different approach to onboarding and retention.
Building it with design partners over a year before opening to everyone shows real discipline. Most founders would have launched in 3 months and iterated on noise.
Here's something worth thinking about as you grow: the hardest part for AI-native SaaS right now isn't the product — it's helping people \see\ the product working. Short-form demo videos that show Skippr in action (real screen, real session) tend to be the #1 trust driver before a trial sign-up, especially when the product is this novel.

Skippr AI - Embeddable AI coworkers that see, speak and act in your app | Product Hunt

# The Live AI Employee, serving every user

Real-time agents that see, talk, and operate software. They onboard, activate, and unblock your users. On their own.

Skippr Listening

Open a business accountStep 3 of 4

✓Company details [...] Skippr operates your product directly through your API or MCP server, not just the UI, so tasks complete at much higher speed.
 ### Choose your agent's skills

  Compose each agent in the builder: push-to-talk, live sessions, voice-only or in-app chat, guided walkthroughs or ad-hoc help, on-screen annotations, and action planning.
 ### Human-in-the-loop control

  Your team can listen, take over, or escalate any live session. Set guardrails, approval flows, and stop-words per persona.
 ### Enterprise-grade security

  SOC 2 and ISO 27001 aligned. Custom deployment options, BYO LLM, and dedicated tenancy unlock as you scale up.
 ### Session analytics & follow-ups [...] ### Personalized 1:1 sessions

  Live voice + screen sessions tailored to where the user is in your product and what they're trying to do. No generic walkthroughs.
 ### Scans your product & knowledge base

  Skippr scans your product and knowledge base, then auto-refreshes the moment anything changes, so answers stay current.
 ### Click-for-you

  Skippr can take the pointer and finish the task with the user in the loop, every step. From form-fills to multi-screen flows.
 ### Branded to you

  Your colors, voice, tone, and logo. Themable down to the cursor trail. Looks like part of your product, not a third-party tool.
 ### Plugs into your product API & MCP

results.title: Skippr
results.content:
# Skippr
Live AI agents for fast-growing products. They see, speak, and act on every call, in every app.
Technology, Information and Internet • London • 5,597 followers • 2-10 employees

## Overview
Skippr agents are the building blocks for every native AI company. The Skippr platform gives native AI teams live multimodal agents in their stack. They join calls and embed in every app. They help product and CSM teams onboard users, shorten time to value, drive engagement, and upsell. They save hundreds of hours a month, following up with users, tracking every change to your product, and updating enablement and product teams. Your best product expert, multiplied endlessly, available to everyone.

### Website

### Crunchbase

### LinkedIn
N/A

### Industry
Technology, Information and Internet [...] at some point and edges into knowledge base / search territory across all customer data, not just Granola's PLG data. Deeper moat, longer sales cycle, much bigger ACV. Self-serve rarely scales cleanly into enterprise without that motion. → Skippr Specialist ( skippr.ai , currently in beta), our latest product. Autonomous AI agent acting as a product specialist: onboards, trains, and demos software for end users, follows up, updates itself as the product changes. Clear HOLG anchor: outcome-led at the core, priced at a fraction of what a human product specialist costs today. But with a productized out-of-the-box foundation and self-serve trial entry to shorten the sales cycle and enable POCs. Following up with a wider piece: wins, failures, and a check on the myths founders hear about what [...] ## Additional
